arts.ttl: Wolves man has put himself on the radar – Value rising, ‘important’ clubs following him
arts.sum: Hugo Bueno’s performances for Feyenoord on loan from Wolverhampton Wanderers have sparked interest in the full-back ahead of the summer. That’s according to AS, who report that the defender’s great performances in the Champions League have put the Wolves man on the radar for various clubs.
